CitizenHistoryItem.title: CitizenHistoryItem
CitizenHistoryItem.description: Historical simplified document snapshot saved in Firestore. Syncs with citizen credentials.

category.description: Detected category, such as Welfare Notice, Judicial Policy.

relevancePassed.description: Whether the document succeeded NIC relevancy benchmarks.

simplifiedEnglish.description: Simplified plain English text of the document.

createdAt.description: Precision server timestamp marking entry insertion.

/citizen_history/{historyId}.description: Collection of official simplified document reports securely saved by citizens to their Firebase.
